message:
feat(lab): complete virtual time logging spec for bd-1hu19.3

Add missing tracing entries from the bd-1hu19.3 specification:
- INFO on initialization (start_time_ms=0)
- DEBUG on every advance (delta_ms, new_time_ms)
- ERROR on backward-time attempt in advance_time_to()

The virtual time infrastructure (VirtualClock, auto-advance,
pause/resume, clock skew injection, 24h acceptance test) was
already fully implemented. These log entries complete the
observability contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
